use_cases: Hero section background for landing pages with subtle depth
Full-page decorative backdrop for SaaS dashboards
Animated background layer for portfolio and media sites
Theme-adaptive visual element for modern web applications
ai_summary: A Three.js-powered dotted particle grid background that renders thousands of animated points in a 3D perspective. Adapts to light/dark themes by adjusting dot colors, features fog depth effects and continuous animation. Used as a decorative full-page backdrop for hero sections, landing pages, or any content overlay.
